scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix mobile run start:lan"
scripts.dev:web-android:full: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix mobile run start:lan"
scripts.dev:web:full: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix mobile run web"
scripts.dev:android:full: concurrently -n backend,android -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix mobile run android"
scripts.dev:ios:full: concurrently -n backend,ios -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix mobile run ios"
